name: Alterola Biotech, Inc.
summary: Alterola Biotech, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, focus on the development of cannabinoid, cannabinoid-like, non-cannabinoid pharmaceutical active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs), and pharmaceutical medicines made from cannabinoid in United Kingdom and worldwide. The company focuses on developing food-grade ingredients, regulated pharmaceuticals, and regulated food products. In addition, it focuses on the development of bulk ingredients for supply into the cosmetic sector. The company was formerly known as Jedediah Resources Corp. and changed its name to Alterola Biotech, Inc. in July 2010. Alterola Biotech, Inc. was incorporated in 2008 and is based in Birkenhead, the United Kingdom.
